items.title: Rechargeable Find My wallet trackers don’t get much less than this, score UGREEN’s new FineTrack Slim for just $18 (All-time low)
items.summary:
UGREEN FineTrack Slim Find My Wallet tracker

Buy for $18 (Reg. $25)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This updated FineTrack Slim card tracker comes with a rechargeable battery that can be topped up using a MagSafe or other Qi-compatible wireless charger. It works with Apple’s Find My network, and you get features like real-time location tracking, IP68 water resistance, and a 100dB speaker for locating your misplaced wallet.

Update 6/16: Amazon has dropped the price even further on this Ninja 12-in-1 Double Stack Oven Combo to a new all-time $230 low ahead of Prime Day.

Amazon is currently offering the Ninja Double Stack XL 12-in-1 Countertop Oven Combo for $249.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. It’s down from a $430 full price, with the discounts we’ve tracked in its history typically taking the costs down between $300 and $250. items.title: Bissell’s Little-Green multi-purpose deep cleaner drops to $95 2026 low ahead of Prime Day + mini cleaner at $80
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you can find Early Prime Day savings hitting the popular Bissell Little-Green Multi-Purpose Potable Deep Cleaner for $94.99 shipped. Normally fetching $130 at full price, we’ve only seen discounts to $110 and $100 in 2026 so far, while today’s deal is the first time this year that we’ve spotted it dipping lower. While it’s gone lower in the past, this is still a solid (and rare) chance to score a $35 markdown off the going rate for the best price in 2026. You can also get the same portable cleaning convenience in a smaller form-factor with Bissell’s Little-Green Mini down at $79.99 shipped from its full $100 price tag. There are also all the other deals on the brand’s cleaning devices in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.summary:
Afforable Apple Pencil alternative for iPad

Buy for $5 (Reg. $10)

Apply 6VI4YHA5 during checkout.

What we love

This third-party stylus offers a lot of the same features found on more expensive Apple Pencil alternatives, including palm rejection, USB-C charging, and magnetic attachment support for select iPad Pro and iPad Air models. It won’t replace Apple’s higher-end Pencil for everyone, but it covers the same core functions at a significantly lower price point for basic note-taking, annotation, and everyday use.
